narrative: Hawkish Fed repricing drives a USD breakout as hotter inflation data fuels a bear steepener in US yields—DXY firms +0.46% while gold retreats -3.12% toward $4,539. USD/JPY holds at 158.704 as the 286bp SOFR-TONA carry sustains the bid despite intervention risk; options market diverges with a strong -1.73 put skew in 25d RR. Equities sell off -1.05% while VIX rises 18.4. Watch RBNZ rate decision May 27.
